description: 基于开源技术栈的公司战略规划推演系统。核心能力：LLM驱动实体抽取 + nano-graphRAG知识图谱 + 自研战略模拟引擎，取代 MiroFish 中的 Zep Cloud 和 OASIS，实现多Agent博弈模拟与信念演化追踪。

graphRAG.mirofish: Zep Cloud (自动抽取 + 存储 + 检索)
graphRAG.rationale: Zep 的核心价值是内部 LLM 自动抽取实体关系。nano-graphRAG 本身不包含 LLM 调用，需要额外实现一个 Entity Extraction Layer 调用 ILLMProvider 来完成抽取。

implementation.storage: nano-graphRAG 内置存储（方案A：简单优先）
implementation.extraction: 批量处理 + 异步抽取（方案B：避免实时 LLM 调用延迟）
implementation.extractionFlow: 文本 → 分批 → LLM抽取实体关系 → 存入 nano-graphRAG → 异步索引

simulationEngine.ourChoice: 自研战略模拟引擎（基于 OASIS 框架但重写核心决策逻辑）
simulationEngine.rationale: 战略博弈场景（信息不对称、隐藏动作、信念追踪）与通用社交模拟有本质差异。复用 OASIS 的模拟循环框架，但 Agent 决策逻辑和传播模型需要重写。

reusableFromOASIS.simulationLoop: OASIS 的多 Agent 并行循环框架可复用
NOT_reusable: Agent 决策逻辑（需要战略博弈）
传播模型（需要信息不对称）

llm.ourChoice: Ollama 本地为主 + Bailian 备选
llm.rationale: 战略推理需要更强的模型能力和更低的延迟。本地 Ollama 部署 Qwen2.5-72B 成本更低、延迟更小；Bailian 作为云端备选。

models.strategy: 本地优先，失败自动切换云端

userStories.title: Define IGraphStore interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a IGraphStore abstract interface so that the graph storage layer can be swapped between Zep and local implementations.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/interfaces/graph_store.py with IGraphStore ABC class
Define methods: create_graph, insert_texts, search, get_nodes, get_edges
IGraphStore methods have typed signatures and docstrings

userStories.title: Define ILLMProvider interface
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a ILLMProvider abstract interface so that LLM calls can be routed to Bailian, Ollama, or MiniMax without changing call sites.
acceptanceCriteria: Create backend/interfaces/llm_provider.py with ILLMProvider ABC class
Return type: str for both methods

userStories.title: Implement EntityExtractor using ILLMProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need EntityExtractor to extract entities and relationships from text using LLM, replacing Zep's auto-extraction capability. This is the KEY DIFFERENCE from MiroFish - Zep has built-in LLM extraction, nano-graphRAG does not.
acceptanceCriteria: EntityExtractor uses ILLMProvider for LLM calls
extract_entities(text, ontology) returns List[Entity] with type, name, attributes
extract_relations(text, entities, ontology) returns List[Relation] with source, target, type
BATCH MODE: extract_batch(texts, ontology) → async extraction with progress callback
LLM prompt includes ontology schema to guide extraction
Unit tests pass with mocked ILLMProvider

userStories.title: Implement BailianAdapter for ILLMProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need BailianAdapter implementing ILLMProvider so that existing Bailian LLM calls are routed through the ILLMProvider interface.
acceptanceCriteria: Both chat and completion methods work
Unit tests pass with mocked Bailian API

userStories.title: Implement OllamaAdapter for ILLMProvider
userStories.description: As a developer, I need OllamaAdapter implementing ILLMProvider so that local Ollama models can be used as a drop-in LLM provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Both chat and completion methods work
Unit tests pass with mocked Ollama server

userStories.title: Implement ConfigManager with centralized configuration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ConfigManager to centralize all configuration loading so that configuration is loaded once and injected into services, replacing scattered os.environ.get calls.
acceptanceCriteria: ConfigManager loads .env on init, no repeated load_dotenv calls
ConfigManager provides typed access to all config values
backend/config.py updated to use ConfigManager internally

userStories.title: Refactor GraphBuilderService to use dependency injection
userStories.description: As a developer, I need GraphBuilderService to use EntityExtractor for entity/relation extraction and LocalKnowledgeStore for storage. This replaces Zep auto-extraction with our own LLM-based extraction.
acceptanceCriteria: GraphBuilderService.__init__ accepts entity_extractor: EntityExtractor and knowledge_store: IKnowledgeStore
Results stored via knowledge_store.insert_entity() and knowledge_store.insert_relation()
Unit tests pass with mocked EntityExtractor and mocked IKnowledgeStore

userStories.title: Refactor ZepToolsService to use IGraphStore
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ZepToolsService to accept IGraphStore via constructor injection so that it is testable independently of Zep SDK.
acceptanceCriteria: All Zep SDK calls replaced with graph_store interface calls
Unit tests pass with mocked IGraphStore

userStories.title: Implement ServiceFactory with provider switching
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ServiceFactory to create graph store and LLM provider instances based on config so that the right adapter is instantiated without call sites knowing the provider.
acceptanceCriteria: Provider selection driven by config values (zep/local, bailian/ollama)

userStories.title: Add MockGraphStore and MockLLMProvider for testing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need mock implementations of IGraphStore and ILLMProvider so that all services can be unit tested without real API calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Both mocks implement their respective interfaces
Mocks can be configured to return specific values or raise errors

acceptanceCriteria: Define methods: run, pause, stop, resume, get_status

acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests pass with mocked components

Supports Twitter and Reddit platform formats

userStories.title: Create Entity dataclass in models/entity.py

userStories.title: Implement StrategicProfileGenerator using IKnowledgeStore

generate(entity) returns StrategicAgent with beliefs, interests, agent_type, influence_weight
Supports AgentType: POLICY_MAKER, CORPORATE_EXEC, INSTITUTIONAL_INVESTOR, ANALYST, MEDIA, ADVOCACY
userStories.notes: RENAME from LocalProfileGenerator - generates StrategicAgent, not OasisAgentProfile. Key difference from MiroFish social simulation.

userStories.title: Async-ify simulation round execution
userStories.description: As a developer, I need simulation round execution to be fully async so that all agents in a round execute LLM calls concurrently instead of waiting for each other.
acceptanceCriteria: run_twitter_simulation.py / run_reddit_simulation.py: each round uses asyncio.gather for all agent LLM calls
Round N+1 does not wait for Round N LLM calls to complete before starting (pipeline)
SimulationManager has scale option: --scale large enabling async mode
100 agents: round latency < 10s; 1000 agents: round latency < 30s

userStories.title: Add large-scale benchmark tests

Create backend/benchmark/1000_agent.py: runs 1000-agent simulation, reports latency
Profile generation < 2min for 100 agents, < 5min for 1000 agents
Round latency < 10s for 100 agents, < 30s for 1000 agents

Clusters are color-coded by stance or entity_type
userStories.notes: Code notes exist in PRD but frontend/ directory not created yet. Needs implementation.

userStories.title: Add pipeline completion/failure notifications and toast UI
userStories.description: As a user, I need a notification when the pipeline completes or fails so that I don't have to keep watching the screen.
userStories.definitionOfDone: Toast notification appears on pipeline completion or failure.
acceptanceCriteria: Toast notification appears: 'Pipeline completed — report ready' (success) or 'Pipeline failed: {stage}' (error)
Success toast links to report view
Error toast shows which stage failed
Toast auto-dismisses after 8 seconds, or user can dismiss manually
If user is on a different page, notification still appears (SSE connection maintained)
userStories.notes: Code notes exist in PRD but frontend/ directory not created yet. Needs implementation.

userStories.title: Allow pipeline parameter configuration before start
userStories.description: As a user, I need to configure pipeline parameters (simulation hours, entity types, report style) before starting so that I can customize the simulation.
userStories.definitionOfDone: Config panel visible before pipeline starts, values passed to POST /api/pipeline/start.
acceptanceCriteria: Config panel shows: simulation_hours (slider/input, default 72), entity_types (multi-select, optional), report_style (dropdown: executive/technical/narrative), notification_webhook (optional URL input)
entity_types set to null by default (LLM auto-inference)
All values sent in POST /api/pipeline/start body.config
userStories.notes: Code notes exist in PRD but frontend/ directory not created yet. Needs implementation.

userStories.title: Define StrategicAgent and core data models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicAgent, BeliefState, InterestProfile, AgentType, and related dataclasses so that the strategic simulation engine has a proper domain model.
acceptanceCriteria: Define StrategicAgent with fields: agent_id, name, agent_type, beliefs, interests, known_facts, private_info, influence_weight, action_repertoire, credibility, relationships, coalition_members
Define BeliefState with positions, fact_beliefs, trust_levels, expectations
Define InterestProfile with primary_interests, secondary_interests, red_lines, risk_tolerance
Define AgentType enum: POLICY_MAKER, CORPORATE_EXEC, INSTITUTIONAL_INVESTOR, ANALYST, MEDIA, ADVOCACY, RATING_AGENCY, INTERNATIONAL_ORG

userStories.title: Define ActionType and StrategicAction models
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ActionType enum and StrategicAction dataclass so that the simulation engine has a well-defined action schema for strategic decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Define ActionType enum covering: public_statement (MAKE_STATEMENT, PUBLISH_REPORT, FILE_DOCUMENT), private_action (PRIVATE_MEETING, LEAK_INFORMATION, CONCEALED_TRADE), deliberative (PROPOSE_DEAL, COORDINATE_POSITION), market_action (TRADE_ASSET, ACCUMULATE_POSITION, RATING_ACTION), information (SHARE_INTEL, SPREAD_NARRATIVE), coalition (FORM_COALITION, JOIN_COALITION, LEAVE_COALITION)
Define StrategicAction dataclass with: action_type, actor_id, public_description, target_ids, private_intent, secret_terms, round_num, is_hidden, propagation_channels
Define ActionResult dataclass with success, public_outcome, private_outcome, belief_updates, relationship_changes

userStories.title: Implement BeliefEngine for belief state tracking
userStories.description: As a developer, I need BeliefEngine to track and update each agent's belief state across simulation rounds so that agents' positions evolve based on new information.
acceptanceCriteria: BeliefEngine.update_belief(agent_id, topic, new_value, update_source) returns BeliefUpdate

userStories.title: Implement StrategicConfigGenerator (SeedDocument → SimulationConfig)
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicConfigGenerator to convert SeedDocument into SimulationConfig so that the document intelligence layer feeds into the strategic simulation.
acceptanceCriteria: _identify_stakeholders extracts AgentType, influence_weight, primary_interests from facts
_map_claims_to_positions maps claims to belief positions for each agent
_assign_private_info assigns known_facts and private_info based on agent role
Unit tests pass with mocked LLM

userStories.title: Implement LLMDecisionEngine for agent action generation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need LLMDecisionEngine to drive each agent's decision-making so that agents act based on their beliefs, interests, and knowledge boundaries.
acceptanceCriteria: System prompt includes: agent role, beliefs, interests, known_facts, available actions, current situation
Supports both strategic action types (not just social media)
Response parsed into StrategicAction with is_hidden, private_intent fields
Unit tests pass with mocked LLM

userStories.title: Implement SimulationLoop with async round execution
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SimulationLoop to run the strategic simulation with async concurrent agent decision-making so that the engine replaces OASIS for strategic scenarios.
acceptanceCriteria: SimulationLoop.run() executes N rounds of: get_active_agents -> generate_actions (async gather) -> execute_actions -> update_beliefs -> propagate_public_info
Semaphore limits concurrent LLM calls (configurable, default 30)
RoundResult captures actions, results, belief_updates, propagation_events
get_active_agents() supports activation scheduling (not all agents act every round)

userStories.title: Implement PropagationLayer for information spread
userStories.description: As a developer, I need PropagationLayer to model how information spreads through the agent network so that public actions reach relevant agents through appropriate channels.
acceptanceCriteria: Supports PropagationChannel: DIRECT, MEDIA, SOCIAL_MEDIA, MARKET_SIGNAL, RUMOR, OFFICIAL
get_agent_knowledge_boundary(agent_id, round) returns Set[str] of known facts

userStories.title: Implement StrategicSimulationRunner as OASIS-free entry point
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicSimulationRunner to serve as the entry point for strategic simulations so that run_strategic_simulation.py can be invoked without OASIS.
acceptanceCriteria: Holds StrategicAgent list, BeliefEngine, SimulationLoop, optional PropagationLayer
Integrated with PRD-003 ISimulationBackend interface (as a second backend option)

userStories.title: Create run_strategic_simulation.py entry script
userStories.description: As an operator, I need run_strategic_simulation.py so that the strategic simulation can be launched from the command line or subprocess.
acceptanceCriteria: Writes actions.jsonl in same format as OASIS for compatibility with existing updater
Supports --wait mode for interactive commands post-simulation

userStories.title: Update Pipeline Orchestrator to use StrategicSimulationRunner
userStories.description: As a developer, I need Pipeline Orchestrator's SIMULATION_RUNNING stage to call StrategicSimulationRunner instead of OASIS-backed SimulationRunner so that the full pipeline uses the strategic engine.
acceptanceCriteria: BeliefEngine updates persisted to simulation state
Existing pause/resume/cancel API continues to work
Unit tests pass with mocked strategic components

userStories.title: Define StakeholderModel for strategic actors
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StakeholderModel to define the relationships and interests between different strategic actors (shareholders, management, board, regulators, competitors) so that the simulation models real corporate dynamics.
acceptanceCriteria: Define StakeholderType enum: SHAREHOLDER, BOARD_MEMBER, EXECUTIVE, COMPETITOR, REGULATOR, PARTNER, EMPLOYEE
Define RelationshipType enum: OWNERSHIP, CONTROL, INFLUENCE, COMPETITION, COOPERATION
Define InterestProfile with financial_goals, strategic_goals, risk_tolerance, time_horizon

userStories.title: Implement StrategicContext with financial modeling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicContext to model the financial and market environment so that agents can make decisions based on real economic factors.
acceptanceCriteria: Support scenario generation: bullish, baseline, bearish

userStories.title: Implement SWOTAnalysisTool for strategic assessment
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SWOTAnalysisTool to generate SWOT analysis for strategic decisions so that the simulation can provide structured strategic insights.
acceptanceCriteria: Integrates with LLM for analysis generation

userStories.title: Implement PorterFiveForces tool for industry analysis
userStories.description: As a developer, I need PorterFiveForces tool to analyze industry structure so that agents understand competitive dynamics.
acceptanceCriteria: Analyze: threat_of_new_entrants, bargaining_power_of_buyers, bargaining_power_of_suppliers, threat_of_substitutes, industry_rivalry
Integrates with StrategicContext for market data

userStories.title: Implement StrategicReportGenerator with decision recommendations
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicReportGenerator to generate reports with actionable strategic recommendations instead of just predictions.
acceptanceCriteria: StrategicReportGenerator.generate() returns StrategicReport with sections: executive_summary, situation_analysis, swot, strategic_options, recommendations, risk_assessment, implementation_roadmap
Each recommendation includes: action, rationale, expected_outcome, risks, timeline
Unit tests pass with mocked components
userStories.notes: NEW - Different from MiroFish report, more actionable

userStories.title: Implement ValuationModel for financial projections
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ValuationModel to project financial outcomes of strategic decisions so that recommendations are grounded in financial impact.
userStories.notes: NEW - Financial foundation for strategic decisions

userStories.title: Implement DecisionOptionGenerator for strategic choices
userStories.description: As a developer, I need DecisionOptionGenerator to generate multiple strategic options from simulation so that decision-makers have choices.
acceptanceCriteria: Each option includes: name, description, resource_requirements, expected_outcomes, risks, pros_cons
userStories.notes: NEW - Core value-add: actionable strategic options

userStories.title: Implement RiskAssessmentMatrix for strategic risks
userStories.description: As a developer, I need RiskAssessmentMatrix to evaluate and categorize strategic risks so that recommendations include risk-adjusted insights.
acceptanceCriteria: RiskAssessmentMatrix.evaluate(options, context) returns List[RiskFactor] with probability, impact, mitigation_strategies
Categorize risks: strategic, operational, financial, compliance

userStories.title: Implement CompetitiveResponseSimulator for rival modeling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need CompetitiveResponseSimulator to model how competitors might respond to strategic moves so that agents anticipate reactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Based on competitor type: aggressive, defensive, opportunistic
Integrates with PropagationLayer for market signals
userStories.notes: NEW - Strategic foresight for competitive dynamics

userStories.title: Implement StrategyBacktester for validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategyBacktester to validate simulation predictions against historical outcomes so that the model improves over time.
userStories.notes: NEW - Validation is critical for practical use

userStories.title: Define PublicOpinionAgent extending StrategicAgent
userStories.description: As a developer, I need PublicOpinionAgent that extends StrategicAgent with social media behavior capabilities so that the simulation can model both strategic actors and public opinion.
acceptanceCriteria: Add fields: sentiment, influence_score, social_reach, platform_preference
AgentType includes: 普通用户, 大V, 媒体账号, 行业KOL
userStories.notes: NEW - Extends StrategicAgent for social media simulation

userStories.title: Implement SocialMediaPropagationLayer
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SocialMediaPropagationLayer to model how information spreads on Twitter and Reddit so that strategic execution can be simulated in social media context.
acceptanceCriteria: Simulate tweet/repost chains, reddit post/comment threads
Model viral spread factors: follower count, sentiment, timing
Support both organic spread and paid amplification

userStories.title: Implement SentimentTracker for opinion dynamics
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SentimentTracker to track sentiment changes over time so that the simulation can predict public opinion shifts.
acceptanceCriteria: Track sentiment: positive, negative, neutral, mixed
userStories.notes: NEW - Sentiment tracking for public opinion

userStories.title: Implement OpinionReportGenerator for public sentiment reports
userStories.description: As a developer, I need OpinionReportGenerator to generate reports predicting public sentiment impact so that strategic decisions include social media risk assessment.
acceptanceCriteria: Identify key influencers and their potential impact
Recommend mitigation strategies for negative sentiment
userStories.notes: NEW - Report for strategic execution prediction

userStories.title: Add hybrid simulation mode to PipelineOrchestrator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need PipelineOrchestrator to support hybrid mode where strategic actors and public opinion agents interact in the same simulation.
acceptanceCriteria: PipelineOrchestrator supports mode: strategic_only, opinion_only, hybrid
Hybrid mode: strategic actions trigger public opinion responses
Both agent types can be simulated in same Pipeline

userStories.title: Implement StrategicImpactPredictor combining both outputs
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicImpactPredictor to combine strategic recommendations with public opinion predictions so that decisions account for social impact.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate impact score with confidence intervals
Identify risks from negative public sentiment
userStories.notes: NEW - Final output for strategic execution scenario

userStories.title: Define StrategicAction for recording agent decisions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicAction to represent agent decisions that are recorded to the graph during simulation, following MiroFish pattern of recording actions then inferring effects later.
acceptanceCriteria: StrategicActionResult contains: action, direct_effects (belief changes), delayed_effects (metrics changes), public_reactions
Effects are generated by LLM based on action context, not hardcoded rules
userStories.notes: SIMPLIFIED - MiroFish style: record actions, infer effects in Report stage

userStories.title: Implement ActionRecorder for graph updates during simulation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ActionRecorder to record agent actions to the graph during simulation, following MiroFish pattern of recording behavior facts for later analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Metrics changes emerge from Agent behavior (e.g., 'executive announces cost cut → market reacts → metrics change')
LLM determines metric changes based on action context, not hardcoded rules
Track metrics: revenue_outlook, profit_margin_outlook, market_sentiment, competitive_position
userStories.notes: SIMPLIFIED - MiroFish style: record actions to graph, not calculate metrics

userStories.title: Implement ExternalShockSimulator for market dynamics
userStories.description: As a developer, I need ExternalShockSimulator to inject external events (competitor moves, regulatory changes, market shifts) that affect the simulation, similar to how MiroFish seeds events.
acceptanceCriteria: Pre-defined shock templates: NEW_COMPETITOR, REGULATORY_CHANGE, MARKET_SHIFT, SUPPLY_CHAIN_DISRUPTION
Shocks affect Agent beliefs and trigger new actions
userStories.notes: Adds dynamism to simulation, like MiroFish's event injection

userStories.title: Integrate ActionRecorder into SimulationLoop
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SimulationLoop to include ActionRecorder so that agent actions are recorded to the graph during each round, enabling post-simulation analysis.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify SimulationLoop steps: generate_actions → execute_actions → track_outcomes → update_metrics → inject_shocks → propagate_effects
Metrics updates based on action results, not formulas
External shocks inject periodically or based on probability
userStories.notes: FOCUS CHANGE: Record actions, don't calculate metrics

userStories.title: Implement StrategicOutcomeReportGenerator for final output
userStories.description: As a developer, I need StrategicOutcomeReportGenerator to generate reports that include both belief evolution and business outcome projections, following MiroFish's report structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Report sections: executive_summary, strategic_actions_timeline, belief_evolution, business_metrics_projection, key_insights, strategic_recommendations
Business metrics presented as projections with confidence intervals
Timeline of key strategic actions and their observed effects
userStories.notes: Final output, like MiroFish's prediction report

userStories.title: Implement StakeholderRelationshipMap visualization
userStories.description: As a user, I need to visualize the relationships between strategic stakeholders so that I can understand the power dynamics and interest alignment.
userStories.definitionOfDone: Interactive force-directed graph showing stakeholder relationships with types, influence weights, and coalition structures.
acceptanceCriteria: Force-directed graph rendered using D3.js or react-force-graph
Nodes represent agents, colored by AgentType
Edges represent relationships with RelationshipType labels
Coalition clusters highlighted with background shading
userStories.notes: NEW - Strategic-specific visualization, not in MiroFish

userStories.title: Implement StrategicDecisionTree visualization
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see the decision tree of strategic options so that I can understand the branching possibilities and outcomes.
userStories.definitionOfDone: Tree diagram showing decision nodes, branches, probabilities, and projected outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Decision tree rendered with branching paths
Each node shows: decision_point, options, expected_outcome

userStories.title: Implement RiskAssessmentMatrix heatmap
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see a risk matrix visualization so that I can understand the risk profile of strategic options.
userStories.definitionOfDone: 5x5 heatmap showing probability vs impact with risk factors positioned accordingly.
acceptanceCriteria: Risk factors positioned based on RiskAssessmentMatrix output
Hover shows: risk_name, probability, impact, mitigation_strategies
userStories.notes: NEW - Risk visualization for strategic decisions

userStories.title: Implement ValuationCharts for financial projections
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see financial projection charts so that I can visualize the business impact of strategic decisions.
userStories.definitionOfDone: Line charts showing DCF projections, comparable analysis, and scenario comparisons.
userStories.notes: NEW - Financial visualization for strategic planning

userStories.title: Implement BeliefEvolutionChart for belief tracking
userStories.description: As a user, I need to see how agent beliefs evolve across simulation rounds so that I can track the dynamics of strategic positioning.
userStories.definitionOfDone: Multi-line chart showing belief positions over time for key agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Line chart with X-axis: round number, Y-axis: belief position
Multiple lines for different agents or topics

executionPhases.name: 基础设施
executionPhases.description: 接口抽象 + 配置管理 + 核心接口定义
executionPhases.keyDeliverable: 接口抽象层（IGraphStore, ILLMProvider, ISimulationBackend）+ 配置管理

executionPhases.name: 战略规划核心 (NEW)
executionPhases.description: 新增战略规划专用组件：利益相关者建模、财务模型、战略分析工具

executionPhases.name: 舆情推演扩展
executionPhases.description: 支持类 MiroFish 的社交媒体传播模拟
executionPhases.note: 用于战略执行预测场景，如不需要可跳过

executionPhases.name: 经营影响模拟 (CORE)
executionPhases.description: 核心经营影响模拟：战略行动→业务指标→财务预测
executionPhases.note: 这是 StrategicMind 与 MiroFish 的本质区别 - 必须追踪实际经营影响

executionPhases.name: 战略模拟引擎
executionPhases.keyDeliverable: 战略模拟引擎核心（BeliefEngine + SimulationLoop）

executionPhases.name: Pipeline集成
executionPhases.keyDeliverable: 端到端 Pipeline + API + 前端

executionPhases.name: 预计总工期
executionPhases.note: 取决于团队规模和优先级

replaces: MiroFish - 通用社交舆论模拟

simulation.framework: 自研 (基于 OASIS 循环框架但重写核心)

whatIsDifferent: 不是社媒舆情模拟，是战略规划推演
不是预测舆论走向，是生成战略决策建议
不是通用Agent，是专业化战略角色
不是情绪分析，是利益与信念追踪

comparisonWithMiroFish.notComparable: 两者面向不同场景，一个是舆情预测，一个是战略规划

strategicPlanning.name: 战略规划推演
strategicPlanning.description: 模拟多方博弈，生成战略决策建议

strategicExecutionPrediction.name: 战略执行预测（类MiroFish）
strategicExecutionPrediction.description: 模拟公司战略在社交媒体的传播和舆论影响

strategicmind.output: 战略决策建议 + 业务影响推演报告
strategicmind.keyAddition: 业务指标从 Agent 行为中涌现，而非预设公式计算

coreDifference.theGap: 没有经营影响模拟，系统只是在追踪'大家怎么想'，无法回答'公司会怎么样'的问题

coreDesign.philosophy: 基于行为的推演，而非数学建模
coreDesign.mirofishInsight: Agent行为 → 事实涌现 → 报告预测
coreDesign.ourApproach: 战略行动 → Agent行为 → 业务影响推演 → 战略建议
coreDesign.keyDifference: MiroFish追踪社交行为，我们追踪战略行为及业务影响
